results.finalAnswer:
ENTRYPOINT: mcp/stdio/server.js
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio - MCP stdio runtime surface; it hosts the server, query layer, storage, freshness, and analysis flow
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/ingest - graph-building pipeline; language loaders, extractors, resolver, sweep, and fingerprinting populate the code graph
SUBSYSTEM: . - the repo-level `aify-project-graph` package surface; package metadata, install docs, scripts, and integrations define how the tool is shipped and consumed

ENTRYPOINT: mcp/stdio/server.js
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/ingest - graph-building pipeline; largest subsystem and home of resolver/sweep/fingerprint logic
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/query - MCP query surface; exposes graph verbs via `query/verbs/index.js` and compact rendering
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio - stdio runtime/orchestration layer; centers freshness and database access via `ensureFresh` and `openDb`

ENTRYPOINT: mcp/stdio/server.js
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/query - MCP-facing verb layer; `server.js` registers tool handlers from here for report/path/impact/file-style queries.
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/freshness - indexing coordinator; `ensureFresh` handles git-diff freshness, locking, rebuild vs noop, and post-index analysis.
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/ingest - graph construction pipeline; language configs, extractors, sweeps, resolvers, and framework plugins turn source into nodes/edges.

ENTRYPOINT: mcp/stdio/server.js
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/ingest - tree-sitter parsing, filesystem sweep, language/framework extractors, and cross-file resolution build the graph facts
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/storage - SQLite schema plus node/edge CRUD persist the graph in `.aify-graph/graph.sqlite`
SUBSYSTEM: mcp/stdio/query - MCP verb handlers, ranking, budgeting, and rendering turn graph data into agent-facing reports and traces
